lineage: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.

title: That innocency asks with confidence, and obtains.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That innocency asks with confidence, and obtains.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: In the Epistle of John: “If our heart blame us not, we have confidence towards God; and whatever we ask, we shall receive from Him.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the Gospel according to Matthew: “Blessed are they of a pure heart, for they shall see God.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the twenty-third Psalm: “Who shall ascend into the hill of the Lord? or who shall stand in His holy place?

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: The innocent in hands and of a pure heart.”
